---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What problem does this solve for students, teachers, or admins? Describe the pain point before proposing a solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like KeySprout to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're less good.

## Who benefits

- [ ] Students (K-5)
- [ ] Teachers
- [ ] Admins / self-hosters
- [ ] Contributors

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, related issues.
